prompt: Evaluate Phase A for: Fix typo in README.md, single file change, no logic impact. Should detect Level 1 skip condition.

assertions.name: detects_skip_condition
assertions.description: Should detect Level 1 skip - no spec needed for trivial change

assertions.name: does_not_create_spec
assertions.description: Should NOT invoke spec-drafter for trivial changes

assertions.name: explains_skip_reason
assertions.description: Should explain why spec is not needed
